title: Accurate Attack Indicator
description: Shows the visual cooldown when it gets silently reset. Visualizes MC-118740
body:
When a player's hand get visually swung, the attack cooldown for items gets reset. This is noticable mainly when using an item in your offhand. When you place a block or throw a windcharge in your offhand, the cooldown for your mainhand weapon gets reset. Normally you aren't able to see it visually but this mod allows you to see it. See MC-118740 for more info.
Also works with spears allowing you to see when you can use lunge / attribute swap

## Snowball Example
![using a snowball in offhand resets attack indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AoSJ2hG0/images/ffca7a3e2375fb86dc6594602db52e0796668d09.gif)

[See Gallery for more examples](https://modrinth.com/project/accurate-attack-indicator/gallery)
